pageSubtitle: A decade of free healthcare for those who need it most
heroHeading: Comprehensive Medical Care, Free of Charge
heroDescription: From a single clinic to a full medical complex — we provide free healthcare, medicine, and surgical services to thousands in Al-Namrouth and surrounding villages.
existingSubtitle: Services running today, serving the community every day
complexDesc: Our flagship facility in Al-Namrouth Village, providing comprehensive free healthcare for over 10 years.
complexTagline: Comprehensive medical care with no charge.
pharmacyDesc: Dispensing free medication to the poor and needy year-round. Medicine is a right for every person in need.
pharmacyTagline: Safe and free medicine for every needy person.
impactSubtitle: Real numbers from our latest year of service
upcomingSubtitle: A project that will change the future of healthcare in the region
upcomingDesc: Establishing a new state-of-the-art charity medical complex to serve the growing needs of the community with specialized medical centers.
radiologyDesc: Providing the latest diagnostic radiology equipment to serve patients for free.
eyeDesc: Cataract and glaucoma surgeries, and vision correction using the latest technologies.
physicalDesc: Motor rehabilitation and physical therapy with modern equipment for all ages.
icuDesc: Fully equipped intensive care rooms to receive critical cases.
dialysisDesc: Advanced kidney dialysis units to provide continuous service to patients.
ctaDescription: Every donation helps bring world-class medical care to those who cannot afford it. Be part of this ongoing charity.
